toolchain.version: Vitis HLS 2025.2 on atlas (Linux, free pre-2026.1). Match the competition's mandated version when tasks drop.
toolchain.license_note: Since 2026.1 (2026-05-25) the free Basic tier is WINDOWS-ONLY; Linux 2026.1+ needs a paid Core tier. Pre-2026.1 (<=2025.2) is free on Linux, which is what atlas runs. xc7z020 is entry-level / free-tier covered.

target.board: PYNQ-Z2 (dev only; NOT assumed to be the evaluator target)
